pi_items.source: Official website wtc.com and Wikipedia confirm official name as 'World Trade Center' for the complex in Lower Manhattan
World Trade Center is located in New York City, New York, confirmed by wtc.com, Wikipedia, and multiple geographic databases

World Trade Center Site actual coordinates from latitude.to: 40.711641, -74.012253 (16-acre site). Metadata value differs by ~0.0010 degrees (~111 meters), which is reasonable for 'approximate' coordinates.

World Trade Center Site actual coordinates from latitude.to: 40.711641, -74.012253 (16-acre site). Metadata value differs by ~0.0011 degrees (~85 meters), which is reasonable for 'approximate' coordinates.

This tolerance value (0.05 degrees) equals approximately 4-5 kilometers at the latitude of New York (40° N), which is a reasonable tolerance for setting a major landmark location in a navigation app. Value is consistent with task verification logic in export_result.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The World Trade Center is a real, public landmark located in Lower Manhattan, New York City at coordinates approximately 40.7116 N, 74.0123 W. The metadata provides approximate coordinates (40.7127, -74.0134) that differ from the actual World Trade Center site center by less than 200 meters, which is appropriate for an 'approximate' location value. The location tolerance of 0.05 degrees translates to roughly 4-5 kilometers, suitable for major landmark identification in a GPS navigation application.
